Name: Category label
Description: JAR / CARBOY / BOTTLE / TOOL / TESTER / PART — the chip shown under the product name on the Jars & Tools PDP.

Name: Tagline
Description: One-line product tagline under the title on the Jars & Tools PDP.

Name: Bought today
Description: Number shown in the hero activity row: 'X people bought this today'.

Name: Rating
Description: Average rating shown in hero (e.g. '4.86'). Text to preserve trailing zero.

Name: Review count
Description: Number of reviews shown beside the rating.

Name: Kit color
Description: Page accent (button, dot, chip background). Used in Jars & Tools PDP only — for the cart drawer accent, also set gutbasket.kit_color.

Name: Kit color (dark)
Description: Dark variant of the kit color (price text, button hover).

Name: Kit color (soft)
Description: Soft variant for backgrounds (chip bg, image bg).

Name: Features section heading
Description: Heading for the 'Why this design' section.

Name: Features section intro
Description: 1-2 sentence intro paragraph under the heading.

Name: Features grid
Description: Array of [label, description] pairs for the 4 feature cards.

Name: Feature icons
Description: 4 emoji or unicode icon characters, one per feature card.

Name: Specs table
Description: Array of [label, value] pairs for the specifications table rows.

Name: Use cases
Description: Array of [label, description] pairs for the 4 use-case cards.

Name: Use case icons
Description: 4 emoji icons, one per use case.

Name: Compatible with
Description: Text for the 'Works with' strip under the specs table.

Name: Kit color (global)
Description: Used by the GB cart drawer to tint the progress bar / accent stripe when this product is in the cart.

Name: Kit color dark (global)
Description: Dark variant of the cart-drawer accent.

Name: Kit color soft (global)
Description: Soft variant of the cart-drawer accent (line-item highlight background).

Name: Cart add-on suggestions
Description: List of related products the GB cart drawer suggests as 'Frequently added' when this product is in the cart.
